Most people think all B vitamins work the same — they don’t.

Here’s the issue: before your body can use B vitamins like folate and B12, it has to convert them into active forms. And a lot of people don’t do that very well.

That’s where methylated B vitamins come in.

Methylated forms — like methylfolate and methylcobalamin — are already active. They bypass extra steps and are ready to be used immediately for things like energy production, nervous system support, and neurotransmitter balance. #methylatedvitamins #vitaminb #bvitamins #holistichealth #multivitamins

NMN (nicotinamide mononucleotide) is one of the most researched longevity molecules for healthy aging, cellular energy, and metabolic support.

NMN helps your body naturally boost NAD+ levels, a critical coenzyme involved in mitochondrial function, DNA repair, cell regeneration, and age-related decline. As we age, NAD+ drops — and that’s linked to fatigue, slower metabolism, brain fog, poor recovery, and visible aging.

By supporting NAD+ production, NMN may help with:
• Increased energy & stamina
• Brain health & cognitive clarity
• Healthy aging & longevity pathways
• Skin aging & cellular repair
• Metabolic health & insulin sensitivity
• Muscle recovery & endurance

Perfect for anyone focused on anti-aging, longevity supplements, mitochondrial health, biohacking, and aging gracefully.
